title: Hull Breach
description: Hull integrity failing on deck 7. Raise emergency force fields to seal the breach.

title: Sensor Ghost
description: An unidentified contact flickers at the edge of long-range sensors. Recalibrate the array to confirm.

title: Reroute Power
description: Primary EPS conduit overloaded. Reroute power through the secondary grid.

title: Plot a Course
description: Helm, plot a heading to the rendezvous coordinates and engage.

title: Battle Stations
description: Hostile vessel decloaking off the port bow. All hands to battle stations, raise shields.
